coverage_summary: The improved test cases show significant progress in functional, validation, and security coverage. New test cases address email format validation (TC010, TC011), empty fields (TC012, TC013), leading/trailing spaces (TC014), email case sensitivity (TC015), and a maximum password length boundary (TC017). However, gaps remain in password complexity, password confirmation, account verification, and special character handling.
remaining_gaps: No test case for password complexity (e.g., uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character) - related to risk RISK001
No test case for password confirmation/re-enter password field (if applicable)
No test case for account verification process (e.g., email confirmation link)
No test case for special characters in email or password (allowed characters)
No test case for very long email or password (buffer overflow testing)
No test case for email with valid but unusual formats (e.g., subdomain, plus addressing)
No test case for password with only numbers or only letters (weak but meets length)
recommendations: Add test cases for password complexity (e.g., at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit, one special character) to address risk RISK001
Add test case for password confirmation field (if applicable) to ensure matching
Add test case for account verification process (e.g., email confirmation link) if required
Add test case for special characters in email and password (allowed characters)
Add test case for very long email or password (buffer overflow testing)
Add test case for email with valid but unusual formats (e.g., subdomain, plus addressing)
Add test case for password with only numbers or only letters (weak but meets length)
Consider combining TC006/TC008 and TC007/TC009 into single test cases for input sanitization to reduce duplication
